message:
fix(core): update durable_state test for max_checkpoints=0 normalization

The implementation now clamps max_checkpoints=0 to 1 via
normalize_max_checkpoints(), so the #[should_panic] test is wrong.
Replace with a positive test that verifies checkpoint succeeds and
count is 1. 26/26 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
